race.comment: TAP OUT GRACIE (8) turned in a solid run last start over 300m at this track finishing 4th and beaten only 5 lengths (17.86). Yet to win out of this box but has been in the placings three times from four starts. Has claims if she runs up to expectations. MIDWEEK SCOTCHES (4) has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing seventh (18.05) in a Grade 5 at this track. Can figure in the finish. SACRIFICE (2) has a strong record this journey here with four wins and a minor from nine starts. Missed the frame latest (23.32) when sixth over 400m at The Gardens in a Grade 5. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts. LITTLE BIG GUY (1) looks an each-way chance.

runners.name: Tap Out Gracie
runners.breeding: b HOOKED ON SCOTCH (AUS)-TAP OUT MINNIE (AUS)
